item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Broad Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarterly earnings season has delivered encouraging results with 56.0% of the 1,300 stocks declaring results reporting positive outcomes, marking a notable improvement from previous quarters. This upward trend reflects broad-based recovery across market capitalisation segments and sectors, signalling renewed investor confidence amid evolving economic conditions. Time: May 17 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Are Delhivery Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Delhivery Ltd's Q4 FY26 results show strong revenue growth and a significant profit increase, indicating improved operational performance. However, concerns remain regarding reliance on non-operational income and low capital efficiency, which could impact future sustainability. Time: May 17 2026 07:14 PM IST

item.title: Are Rolex Rings Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Rolex Rings Ltd's latest results are concerning, with a significant net profit decline to -₹0.15 crores in Q4 FY26 from ₹54.64 crores the previous year, despite a revenue increase to ₹305.69 crores. The company's profitability challenges, highlighted by an unusual tax rate and declining full-year profits, suggest a need for cautious observation moving forward. Time: May 17 2026 07:14 PM IST

item.title: Are Oswal Pumps Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Oswal Pumps Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 39.79% year-on-year, but profitability is under pressure with a decline in operating margin to 23.17%. While the company has high capital efficiency, challenges in margin and working capital management raise concerns for future performance. Time: May 17 2026 07:14 PM IST

item.title: Are Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd's latest results show significant year-on-year profit growth of 901.94% but a quarter-on-quarter decline of 31.97%. While revenue increased and operating margins improved, concerns remain about low return on equity and profit volatility, indicating mixed performance overall. Time: May 17 2026 07:14 PM IST

item.title: Are Western Carriers (India) Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Western Carriers (India) Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 15.67% to ₹495.72 crores, but net profit fell 41.34% to ₹8.26 crores, indicating significant margin pressure and operational challenges. Despite the revenue increase, declining profitability and low return on equity have led to negative market sentiment and reduced institutional interest. Time: May 17 2026 07:14 PM IST

item.title: Are Solex Energy Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Solex Energy Ltd's Q4 FY26 results are strong, showcasing significant revenue growth of 178.56% quarter-on-quarter and a net profit increase of 564.87%, indicating improved operational efficiency. However, the company faces challenges with margin volatility that could impact future performance. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Aaron Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Aaron Industries Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show strong revenue growth of 17.80% sequentially and 13.36% year-on-year, reaching ₹27.33 crores; however, net profit declined by 15.60% year-on-year to ₹2.32 crores, indicating challenges in profitability despite increased sales. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Latent View Analytics Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Latent View Analytics Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales increasing by 24.31% year-on-year, but net profit has slightly declined by 1.36% year-on-year, indicating operational challenges. While operating margins improved, the return on equity is below historical averages, suggesting a need for ongoing monitoring of capital efficiency. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Dharani Finance Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Dharani Finance Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a 10.81% decline in net sales and an 18.75% drop in net profit, indicating challenges in revenue growth and operational efficiency. The company's stock has also underperformed compared to its peers, reflecting ongoing difficulties in achieving consistent financial performance. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Uno Minda Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Uno Minda Ltd's latest results are strong, with record quarterly net sales of ₹5,336.41 crores and a net profit of ₹325.81 crores, reflecting significant year-on-year growth and effective operational efficiency, despite slight declines in operating margins compared to last year. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Anmol India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Anmol India Ltd's latest results show mixed performance, with a slight sequential increase in net sales but a year-on-year decline, while net profit rose significantly year-on-year but fell from the previous quarter. The company's heavy reliance on non-operating income and high leverage raise concerns about its financial stability and future growth prospects. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Valiant Organics Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Valiant Organics Ltd's latest quarterly results show a strong recovery with a net profit increase of 274.29% year-on-year, but the company still faces challenges with a marginal annual net loss and low return on equity, indicating mixed overall performance. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Creative Castings Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Creative Castings Ltd's latest results show mixed performance, with a 22.30% decline in quarterly net sales to ₹11.43 crores and a 35.03% drop in net profit to ₹1.02 crores, raising concerns about revenue stability and profitability despite slight operational improvements. The company has underperformed significantly against its sector, indicating ongoing challenges. Time: May 17 2026 07:13 PM IST
